Photo shared by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026 tagging @hare_official. May be an image of display case, signboard, poster and text that says '3nлH 2N HARE HABE HARE Japanese design featuring formal pieces & modern streetwear Shinjuku, Shibuya & Harajuku'.

Photo by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026. May be an image of ‎duffle coat, overcoat, cardigan, fleece, sweater, clothes hanger and ‎text that says '‎للل BARE Honestly, one of my favorite stores in Japan. Every item feels rooted in Japanese design, very unique, and one of the more affordable stores on this list without compromising on quality. Please don't skip this one.‎'‎‎.

Photo shared by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026 tagging @oy_harajuku. May be an image of clothes hanger, poster and text that says 'OPENYARD Korean contemporary streetwear with clean, modern silhouettes Harajuku uku'.

Photo by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026. May be an image of heart, turtleneck, sweater, clothes hanger and text that says 'I kind of stumbled across this store when was lost, and I'm really glad did. Their pieces lean α little edgier, but the streetwear selection is strong. Prices are very affordable, ended up buying this sweater in black. If you're into Asian streetwear, definitely check them out.'.

Photo shared by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026 tagging @public_tokyo. May be an image of poster and text that says '0 PUBLIC TOKY Minimal, premium Japanese essentials Shinjuku Shinjuku&Shibuya & Shibuya'.

Photo by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026. May be an image of duffle coat, goosedown coat, overcoat, fleece, parka, jacket, wool and text that says 'Another one of my favorite stores in Japan! I've bought at least atleast2 2- 3 pieces every time I've visited. They specialize in minimal but modern Japanese essentials that just fit really well. The prices are very reasonable for the quality.'.

Photo shared by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026 tagging @studious_official, and @studious_tokyo_newyork. May be a graphic of magazine, poster, book and text that says 'JAPAN from to the WORLD Thefead "TOKYORRANDUNTON STUDIOUS Itisthecal Curated Japanese designers with an original originalin-housecollection in-house collection STUDIOUS Shinjuku, Shibuya, Harajuku & Chuo City'.

Photo by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026. May be an image of sweatpants, clothes hanger and text that says 'This is α great store if you want to check out multiple Japanese brands all in one place. They carry really clean, elevated essentials that you could wear for almost any occasion. Their in-house in- designs are also super modern, good quality, and easy to style.'.

Photo shared by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026 tagging @neighborhood_official. Photo by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026. May be an image of duffle coat, overcoat, raincoat, parka and text that says 'Japanese streetwear heritgage. Can't say more than this. It's definitely on the pricier side, but the quality justifies it. Every piece feels like an elevated basic with a touch of modern streetwear, the kind of pieces that get noticed immediately.'.

Photo by Abhaya Tamrakar on February 11, 2026. May be a graphic of poster, magazine and text that says 'Hare OY Public Tokyo Studious Neighborhood These are my top 5.
